---
name: Skill Request
about: Propose a new engineering skill for the plugin
title: "[Skill Request] "
labels: enhancement, skill
assignees: ''
---

## What failure mode or gap does this skill address?

Describe the engineering mistake or quality gap that keeps happening without this skill.

## What goes wrong without this skill?

Give a concrete example. What does the AI do incorrectly, and what is the consequence?

## What stack or framework does it apply to?

Is this skill universal, or specific to a language/framework/domain?

- [ ] Universal (applies to all projects)
- [ ] Language-specific: [specify]
- [ ] Framework-specific: [specify]
- [ ] Domain-specific: [specify, e.g., payments, auth, real-time]

## Example scenario

Walk through a realistic scenario where this skill would activate and what it would enforce:

1. The user asks Claude to...
2. Without the skill, Claude would...
3. With the skill, Claude would instead...

## Suggested category

Where would this skill live in the `skills/` directory?

- [ ] architecture
- [ ] collaboration
- [ ] core
- [ ] debugging
- [ ] documentation
- [ ] frontend
- [ ] meta
- [ ] operations
- [ ] planning
- [ ] quality
- [ ] security
- [ ] New category: [specify]
